form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start favourite; won by 4 len at this track March 15 over 1400m defeating Success Cow carrying 55.5kg at $1.10. The start before that sat on the pace when 2nd of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Seongsil Dream carrying 54kg at $1.70. Ideally placed to make it two on the trot.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 30-day let-up. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 12 at this track on March 13 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Daeseong Gold carrying 53kg at $6. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.5 len at this track February 8 over 1200m defeating Best Prime with 54.5kg at $5.30. Best form should see her measure right up.
